postconditions: destination is a regular file with nlink 1
destination bytes equal inherited source FD bytes
caller verifies deterministic tree root before and after publication

fileDescriptors.3: inherited read-only parent directory FD; source and destination names are resolved relative to it
fileDescriptors.4: inherited read-only source FD; fstat must equal fstatat(parent, source, AT_SYMLINK_NOFOLLOW)

argumentRules: source and destination are nonempty basenames
source and destination are not . or ..
source and destination contain no slash
invariants: all source and destination lookups are no-follow
destination must be absent before publication
there is no rename, renameat, link, copy, or replacement fallback
source identity is checked before publication
file content identity is checked after publication
directory tree identity is supplied and checked by the caller
parent directory is fsynced by the caller after success
